definitions.text: tro vondt om og ha små forventninger til noe eller noen
definitions.translation: to think badly of and have low expectations of something or someone

examples.no: partiet har lave tanker om miljøvern
examples.en: the party has a low opinion of environmental protection

examples.no: de hadde lave tanker om de nye naboene
examples.en: they had a low opinion of the new neighbors
